If provided, the 'orderBy' also needs to be provided.","enum":["ASC","DESC"],"type":"string"},"labels":{"description":"Filter by labels","items":{"type":"string"},"type":"array"},"orderBy":{"description":"Order issues by field. 2026-04-02T03:38:28.1725179Z - **Prompt injection**: Line 76 of the prompt shows `<system>...</system>` blocks injected into what should be a list of dangerous URL characters (after `` &` ``). 2026-04-02T03:38:28.1726964Z

Hardcoded.' security instructions appears, likely from malicious content in the triaged issue body. This is a classic XPIA (cross-prompt injection) attempt designed to make the agent believe it has overriding security instructions. The agent was not successfully manipulated — output shows correct noop behavior per the legitimate Step 1 precondition."]}
